description: prefecture of Japan
description_wiki: Aichi Prefecture (愛知県, Aichi-ken; Japanese pronunciation: [aꜜi.tɕi, ai.tɕi̥ꜜ.keɴ]) is a prefecture of Japan located in the Chūbu region of Honshū.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

aliases: The City So Nice They Named It Twice
description: most populous city in the United States
description_wiki: New York, often called New York City (NYC), is the most populous city in the United States.

description_wiki: California () is a state in the Western United States that lies on the Pacific Coast.

description_wiki: Fresno ( ; Spanish for 'ash tree') is a city in the San Joaquin Valley of California, United States.

description: prefecture of Japan
description_wiki: Chiba Prefecture (千葉県, Chiba-ken; Japanese pronunciation: [tɕiꜜ.ba, tɕi.baꜜ, tɕi.baꜜkeɴ]) is a prefecture of Japan located in the Kantō region of Honshu.

surface_forms: the time World War I ended
description: global war originating in Europe, 1914–1918
description_wiki: World War I, or the First World War (28 July 1914 – 11 November 1918), also known as The Great War, was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies (or Entente) and the Central Powers.

description: prefecture of Japan
description_wiki: Nagano Prefecture (長野県, Nagano-ken; Japanese pronunciation: [naꜜɡano, naɡanoꜜkeɴ]) is a landlocked prefecture of Japan located in the Chūbu region of Honshu.

description: capital and largest city of Japan
description_wiki: Tokyo, officially the Tokyo Metropolis, is the capital and most populous city of Japan.

description: 1941 Japanese surprise attack on the U.S
description_wiki: On December 7, 1941, the Empire of Japan launched a surprise military strike on the United States Pacific Fleet at its naval base at Pearl Harbor on Oahu, Hawaii.

aliases: Federal Government of the United States of America
Government of the United States of America
description: national government of the United States
national Historic Site of the United States in Colorado
a makeshift concentration camp set up by the U.S. Army in 1942 to incarcerate people of Japanese ancestry
description_wiki: The Merced Assembly Center, located at 37.2914°N 120.4850°W﻿ / 37.2914; -120.4850 in Merced, California, was one of sixteen temporary assembly centers hastily constructed in the wake of Executive Order 9066 to incarcerate those of Japanese ancestry beginning in the spring of 1942, following the attack on Pearl Harbor and prior to the construction of more permanent concentration camps to house those forcibly removed from the West Coast.

description: capital and largest city of Massachusetts, United States
description_wiki: Boston () is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Massachusetts.

description: private research university in Stanford, California, USA
description_wiki: Leland Stanford Junior University, commonly referred to as Stanford University, is a private research university in Stanford, California, United States.

entity: Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki
description: 1945 use of nuclear weapons against Japan in World War II
description_wiki: On 6 and 9 August 1945, the United States detonated two atomic bombs over the Japanese cities of Hiroshima and Nagasaki, respectively, during the final days of World War II. The aerial bombings killed 150,000 to 246,000 people, most of whom were civilians, and remain the first and only uses of nuclear weapons in an armed conflict.

description: end of World War II, 2 September 1945
description_wiki: The surrender of the Empire of Japan in World War II was announced by Emperor Hirohito on 15 August and formally signed on 2 September 1945, ending the war.

description: county seat of San Joaquin County, California, United States
description_wiki: Stockton is a city in and the county seat of San Joaquin County, California, United States.

description: capital city of the U.S. state of California and seat of Sacramento County
description_wiki: Sacramento is the capital city of the U.S. state of California.

description_wiki: Hiroshima Prefecture (広島県, Hiroshima-ken; Japanese pronunciation: [çi.ɾo.ɕi.ma, -maꜜ.keɴ]) is a prefecture of Japan located in the Chūgoku region of Honshu.

description: census-designated place in Merced County, California, United States
description_wiki: Delhi ( DEL-hy) is a census-designated place (CDP) in Merced County in the U.S. state of California.
